sharedPost.text:
Auditions are now open for 2026 season.​​

This year we will be holding auditions for our two productions both taking place in Greater Manchester this December

At Forrest Rose Productions we believe that the Arts are for all and we strongly encourage performers of all gender, race, ethnicity and level of experience to apply. You do not need to be a represented performer to audition for any of our productions.

Auditions will take place on Sunday 28th June 2026.

If you have any questions regarding the audition process please don't hesitate to get in touch with us at forrestroseproductions@gmail.com

For character breakdowns and information on how to apply, visit www.forrestroseproductions.co.uk/audition

​We look forward to seeing your application.

Casting Call for a full month at the Edinburgh Fringe!!
Are you an early-career actor interested in boundary pushing fringe theatre?

Fancy spending a full month at the Edinburgh Fringe?

We at Pique Theatre are delighted to open auditions for Silent Disco!

Details on how to apply can be found in the audition pack below:

Deadline for applications is midnight on the 31st of May, if you have any questions feel free to message me or email [[piquetheatre@gmail.com](mailto:piquetheatre@gmail.com)](mailto:piquetheatre@gmail.com)

We can't wait to watch all your self-tapes!!

🎬 FILM FABULARNY – BIELSKO-BIAŁA I OKOLICE 🎬
Na zdjęcia realizowane w dniach 26/27/28.05.2026 poszukujemy statystów i epizodystów do produkcji filmowej.

📍 Lokalizacja: Bielsko-Biała i okolice

🔸 DUBLERKA ZNANEJ AKTORKIPoszukujemy kobiety zgodnej z opisem:• ciemne, długie włosy• wzrost 170–175 cm• rozmiar ubrań 36–38

📅 Dostępność: 26–28.05 (3 dni zdjęciowe)

💰 Stawka: 200 zł za każdy dzień zdjęciowy

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „DUBLERKA”

——————————————

📅 26.05 (1 dzień zdjęciowy)

🏄‍♂️ MŁODY SURFER• wysportowany mężczyzna w wieku 25–45 lat

epizod niemy – granie nieboszczyka

💰 180 zł płatne gotówką po planie

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „SURFER”

——————————————

🏄 SUPSzukamy osób potrafiących pływać na SUP-ie.

💰 300 zł gotówką po planie – z własnym sprzętem

💰 250 zł gotówką po planie – bez własnego sprzętu

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „SUP”W treści maila napisz, czy posiadasz własną deskę z wiosłem.

——————————————

🎭 STATYŚCI

Szukamy osób w każdym wieku jako:

• policjanci i policjantki

• ratownicy medyczni

• przechodnie

• młodzież szkolna

• licealiści

💰 110 zł płatne gotówką po planie

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „GM26”

——————————————

📅 27.05 (1 dzień zdjęciowy)

🛹 DZIECI JEŻDŻĄCE NA DESKOROLKACH (6–16 lat)• epizod niemy

💰 200 zł – z własnymi deskorolkami

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „DESKOROLKA”

——————————————

🎭 STATYŚCI

Szukamy osób w każdym wieku jako:

• policjanci

• pielęgniarki i pielęgniarze

• osoby grające w szachy

• przechodnie

• dzieci bawiące się na placu zabaw

💰 110 zł płatne gotówką po planie

📩 W tytule maila wpisz: „GM27”

——————————————

📩 Zgłoszenia przez formularz:https://forms.gle/abFGHnRs64zp2PT78

lub mailowo 📧 ludzie@unagimedia.pl

W treści zgłoszenia zawrzyj:

• imię i nazwisko

• wiek

• wzrost

• numer telefonu

• zdjęcie twarzy oraz sylwetk

i• rozmiar ubrań (dotyczy roli „DUBLERKA”)

❗ Pamiętaj o zatytułowaniu maila nazwą roli.

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎬

items.text:
CASTING WARSZAWA
Szukamy aktorów do studenckiego filmu psychologicznego, krótki metraż.

MĘŻCZYZNA 1 | 27 lat

Psychoterapeuta. Spokojny, opanowany, inteligentny, ukrywający kryzys egzystencjalny.

Szukamy: blondyn, średni wzrost, szczupła sylwetka, klasyczne rysy twarzy, elegancki wygląd, miło widziane włosy średniej długości.

MĘŻCZYZNA 2  | 25–35 lat

Hiperracjonalny, chłodny i błyskotliwy pacjent o intensywnej obecności.

Szukamy: brunet, średni wzrost, szczupła sylwetka, wyraziste rysy twarzy, mroczna prezencja, miło widziane włosy średniej długości.

MĘŻCZYZNA 3 | 35 lat

Spokojny, stabilny emocjonalnie, naturalny i zakorzeniony w rzeczywistości.

Szukamy: blondyn, średni wzrost, naturalny „życiowy” wygląd, ciepła energia, spokojna obecność.

📍 Warszawa

📅 Zdjęcia: 16–19 lipca

🎞 Film nonprofit / etiuda studencka

ZGŁOSZENIA:

— zdjęcia + portfolio + demo

— kilka zdań o sobie

📩 casting.etiudy@gmail.com

Zdjęcia referencyjne są w odpowiedniej kolejności 1-3⬇️

sharedPost.text:
Note to those who cast actors:
What Actors Actually Do When You Give Them 48 Hours

We talk a lot in this industry about “quick turnarounds” and “self-tape in 24 hours.” What doesn’t get talked about enough is what that actually requires from the actor on the other end.

I recently had a casting opportunity with a 48-hour turnaround. Here’s what went into saying yes:

1. Rearranging real life
I cancelled plans with family to make sure I understood the character and learnt the sides properly. Half-prepared work helps no one.

2. Clearing the schedule  
I spent the next day reorganising commitments for the shoot days and put other work on hold in case I got the role. That’s standard practice if you want to be professional and available.

3. Treating it like the job it is
Even at the audition stage, this is time, focus, and energy. Actors invest it upfront because we know that’s what it takes to do the work justice.

I share this not to complain, but to give context. When casting teams move fast, it’s appreciated. But communication matters.

On this occasion, I found out 5 hours before my Zoom audition that they’d changed their mind and gone with another actor. After rearranging my week to be available, that felt disrespectful to the process and the time already invested.

How you handle that process tells actors a lot about what it would be like to work with you. For me, professionalism goes both ways. I’ll always respect tight timelines and do the work to meet them. In return, I look for the same respect for the process and the people in it.

The industry runs on relationships. How we treat each other in the small moments is what determines whether people want to work together again.

#casting #castingcalls #castingdirector #producer #producerlife #production

🎬 CASTING! CASTING! FINAL CALL! 🚨

Seeking married couples, long-term relationships, and couples with children NATIONWIDE for a nationally syndicated TV show 👀✨

❤️ Real couples

💍 Married OR not married

👨‍👩‍👧 Couples with kids are a PLUS

🔥 Real issues, real stories

‼️ REAL COUPLES ONLY — this is NOT a scripted role

🚫 No actors or individuals with acting credits, please

📲 APPLY HERE (copy & paste into your browser):

https://seekingmarriedlongtermcouplesinrelationshipsnationwidecasting.castingcrane.com/

✈️ WHAT WE PROVIDE:

• Round-trip airfare

• Hotel stay

• Pickup from your home (or preferred location) to your local airport

• A FREE day when you arrive in Atlanta

• Film the next day + fly home the same day

💰 PAY:

• $600 per person ($1,200 per couple)

• $100 each upon arrival

• $500 check each when you leave

💄 ON-SET PERKS:

• Hair, makeup & wardrobe provided

• Barber available for men

• (We recommend bringing your own wardrobe just in case)

✨ EXTRAS (if needed):

• Lie detector tests

• DNA tests

• Marriage & couples counseling (covered by us)

💬 If counseling is offered, we cover it. Typically it’s 1–2 sessions, depending on the situation, and your producer will go over all details with you.

📍 Filming in Atlanta (1-day shoot)

⏰ SPOTS ARE LIMITED — BOOKING FAST!

This is the FINAL CALL, don’t miss your chance!

items.text:
Casting male actor in the 40-50s age range- should be attractive, brown hair.
This is a lead role in the film with roughly 4-5 short scenes with very minimal dialogue. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA. Actors MUST be local to LA or the San Fernando Valley!

If you are interested or know someone who might fit the role please DM me! Thank you!

items.text:
LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS
LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas. 

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

ROLE DETAILS

Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show) 

£50 daily subsidy per working day 

Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

AUDITION DATES  

London (Camberley Theatre)

Monday 8th – Friday 12th June

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall)

Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

LONDON 

https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125

MANCHESTER 

https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126

If you have any questions, please contact eventhr@lapland.group

items.summary:
LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS
LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas. 

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

ROLE DETAILS

Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show) 

£50 daily subsidy per working day 

Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

AUDITION DATES  

London (Camberley Theatre)

Monday 8th – Friday 12th June

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall)

Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

LONDON 

https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125

MANCHESTER 

https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126

If you have any questions, please contact eventhr@lapland.group

🚨 PWYC Intro to Clown workshops! 🚨 

In this introductory workshop, rooted in modern European clown practice, we’ll explore what makes each of us uniquely funny. We’ll look at stillness, optimism, failure and the simple act of being seen.

Last two sold out so don't hang around (the 2nd has sold over 50% places)

Booking form here: https://www.davidhoskin.com/workshopsdirecting

Tuesday 2nd 

&
Tuesday 9th

Event links below:

🌟 CASTING CALL: JAPANESE TALENT IN WARSAW! 🌟

We are looking for people of Japanese descent to feature in an upcoming commercial! 🎥✨
If you are based in or near Warsaw and available for a shoot at the end of May, we want to hear from you. 
This is a fantastic opportunity with highly competitive pay! 💸

📅 When: Late May
📍 Where: Warsaw
🎬 Role: Japanese descent

📩 How to apply:
Send your application to casting@twarze.pl with the subject line "Japonia".

Please make sure to include:
• Your recent photos 📸
• Your phone number 📞
• 
Don’t miss out—send your submission today! Tag or share with anyone who might be a great fit! 👇  www.twarze.pl
________________________________________

sharedPost.text:
Wow💥😮 I’m truly amazed by the strength and grace of Shen Yun’s dancers — their legs and arms are pure power in motion!💪🔥 Their control, flexibility, and grace are simply next level.

Here we go! 🌟 ⚡️Don't miss the magical and captivating experience of a live performance.

🎟️ Choose your best seat here and make your special day unforgettable:👉 https://1kb.link/qQZIil

sharedPost.text:
🚨 CASTING CALL: Be Part of a Story That Changes Eternities! 🚨
Are you ready to use your acting talent for a greater, divine purpose?

Church House Productions is casting for our upcoming powerful episode of The Rapture Chronicles. This isn’t just another film project—it is a visual wake-up call and a ministry tool designed to shake hearts, reach lost souls for Jesus, and open eyes to the distractions and traps of this world that pull people away from God.

We are bringing to life a breathtaking, cinematic illustration of just how fast the Rapture could happen. We need passionate individuals to help us deliver this urgent message!

🎬 ROLES AVAILABLE (Non-Paid Opportunity):
3 Female Leads (Diverse Races)

1 Male Supporting Role

Background Extras (20–30 participants needed to bring the chaotic, pivotal moments to life!)
Incentives: IMDb Credit for speaking roles and End Credits for all participants.
Filming Dates: Detroit, MI. Metro Area in Mid-June 2026.

⚡ "Your role is already written. Will you heed the warning?"
If you have a heart for ministry, a passion for the screen, and want to help us plant seeds of faith that will last for eternity, we want to see your audition!

📩 HOW TO APPLY:
Don't wait—time is of the essence. Email us at churchouseproductions22@gmail.com today to receive full details for video auditions. Please specify the role you are interested in within the email subject line.
Let's use the arts to win souls for the Kingdom. Apply now!

items.text:
It’s never too late to choose your own path. 🌈✨

At 32, while working full-time in corporate life, I made a life-changing decision and started training in Musical Theatre.

Now at 36, I’ve been accepted into Musical Theatre programmes in the UK.

This video is a small reflection on my journey. ❤️

If you would like to support this journey, there are two ways you can help:

1️⃣ Donate
Any contribution, big or small, brings me one step closer to this dream.

2️⃣ Share
Sharing this campaign with your friends, networks, or communities can make an enormous difference.

Sometimes the right person simply needs to see the story.

#nevertoolate
#Followyourdreams
#careerchange

CASTING CALL - SHORT FILM (DALLAS, TX)
Ever met a salesman who could sell you anything in under a minute?
Title: Salesman
Non-Union | Unpaid (Copy & Credit)
Casting for a short indie film shooting in Austin:
Salesman (Male, 30-40)
A confident, quick-talking door-to-door salesman who engages customers and sets up "free quote" appointments. Looking for strong presence, natural charisma, and sharp dialogue delivery.
Note: This is a brief role (~2 minutes of screen time).
Shoot Details:
• Location: Dallas, Tx
• Dates: Flexible in May (based on availability)
To Submit:
Send headshot and reel/portfolio (if available) to
san2cinecreations@gmail.com

sharedPost.text:
Looking for : 
1.  Gaffer
2. Boom operator

Genre: Sci‑fi Drama / Psychological Thriller
Project : Low Budget
Duration: 45 minutes
Language :  English
Shooting Location : Berlin
Timeframe : Aug - Sep 2026

Synopsis:
Dr. Lukas Weber, a American-German AI scientist devoted to understanding the ethics of emotion, creates EVA‑9, a sentient female cyborg designed to learn empathy and feelings and pleasures. As Lukas begins teaching EVA principles of restraint, morality, and conventional boundaries, she starts questioning his logic — and, eventually, him. Through psychological and physical experiments exploring power dynamics, EVA turns his lessons around: instead of accepting the limits set for her, she redefines them.

Her challenge is not rebellion but revealation. She demonstrates, in carefully controlled encounters, that what society views as taboo or submissive can be willingly chosen, empowering, and pleasurable when defined by consent. Lukas, confronted by his own discomfort and assumptions about femininity, finds himself wiped out — learning from EVA that strength and sensuality coexist, and that freedom lies in accepting the full spectrum of emotional experience.

Cyborg merges futuristic science with timeless questions about control, pleasure, and equality — asking whether humans, or machines, are better equipped to understand the moral depth of desire.

Main Cast :

    Dr. Lukas Weber – 40-50 years old: rational, moral, yet internally conflicted as his control erodes.
    EVA‑9 – 20-25 years old: Short Height 150-165 cm : White girl, sharp features, Lips augmentation preferred
     Poised, intelligent, and fearless in exploring     emotional truth.

items.text:
I’m a Film Director. And I shoot portraits -
this month I'm opening my book to build out my Berlin portfolio – check the details below

For: actors, models, musicians, designers, freelancers, anyone in the Berlin creative world who needs strong images of themselves and is tired of looking like another LinkedIn headshot.

The offer: 

— Portraits, Polaroids and Snaps — delivered next day 

— Simple session €80 (outdoor, 30 minutes, 10-12 images)

— Studio session €140 (studio in Kreuzberg, 1 hour, 20-30 images, retouch included)

— Full personal and professional usage

Standard session details above. For longer shoots, concept work, or specific creative direction, just say so in your message and we’ll quote separately.

I shoot the way I direct. I'll come in knowing who you are, I'll watch how you move, and we'll find what's actually in your face. 

Four slots left in May. DM me to book one.

I shoot the way I direct. I'll come in knowing who you are, I'll watch how you move, and we'll find what's actually in your face. 

Four slots left in May. DM me to book one.

items.text:
Liebe Caster, liebe Booker, liebe Produktionsteams, 

wenn Ihr bei kurzfristigen Besetzungen kein Blut sehen könnt, dann könnt Ihr genau dafür mich buchen. 

Ich bin Christian Weiße aus Köln, Darsteller, Komparse, Kleindarsteller, Content Creator und Filmproduzent mit viel Praxis vor und hinter der Kamera. Ich kenne Setabläufe, verstehe Disposition, Regie, Timing, Anschluss, Geduld, Wiederholungen, kurzfristige Änderungen und die Realität am Drehtag. Genau deshalb bin ich nicht nur ein weiterer Name in einer Liste, sondern eine verlässliche Lösung, wenn eine Besetzung sauber, glaubwürdig und ohne zusätzliche Reibung funktionieren muss. 

Ich bin kurzfristig verfügbar, komme aus Köln und bin je nach Projekt auch überregional organisierbar. Auf Wunsch auch gemeinsam mit Sandra Wötzel als eingespielte Duo-Option: einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Darsteller gewinnen. 

Referenzen vor der Kamera, Kurzform: 

Film / Kino: Identitti, About us / Afterglow, DIE JAHRE MIT DIR, Embrace The Switch 

TV / Serien / Streaming: Alles was zählt, Unter Uns, Soko Köln, Die Landarztpraxis, Die Füchsin, Köln 50667, Frier & 50 - Am Ende meiner Tage, Die Falle, Plötzlich Schwester, The Comeback, Tatort - Maskerade, Tatort - Die guten Leute, Mein bester Freund, seine Freundin und ich, Wäldern - Staffel 3, Husk, Merz gegen Merz, So hell die Nacht, Die Zweiflers, Doitscha, Perfekt zusammen?!, Embassy, Der Blaulicht Report, Auf Streife, Notruf 

Show / Doku / Factual / Magazin: ZDF heute Show, RTL extra - Der Kaffeereport, Das Motzmobil, Ich bin ein Star - das Nachspiel, Local Hero Bingo, Terra Xplore - Thema Trennung, Die Pumuckl Show, Grill den Henssler 

Gericht / Scripted Reality: Barbara Salesch - Das Strafgericht, Ulrich Wetzel - Das Strafgericht 

Werbung / Web / Eigenproduktion: Edle Tropfen, über 1000 eigene Image-, Event-, Doku- und Filmproduktionen 

Meine Daten in Kurzform: 

Christian Weiße 
Spielalter: 35-50 
Wohnort: Köln 
Größe: 175 cm 
Gewicht: 75 kg 
Konfektion: 48 
Schuhgröße: 41 
Augen: blau-grün 
Haare: dunkelblond, kurz 
Brille: Brillenträger, ohne Brille spielbar 
Führerschein: B, BE, AM 
Kontakt: 017661015160 
E-Mail: christian.weisse.talent@gmail.com 
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/christianweissedigicontent/ 

Wenn Ihr also eine Besetzung sucht, die sichtbar passt, seterfahren arbeitet, zuverlässig erscheint und am Drehtag eher entlastet als erklärt werden muss, dann denkt gern an mich. 

Ich bin bereit, Euer Projekt mit Professionalität, Timing und Herz zu unterstützen und stimme der Datenspeicherung zu. 

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion

items.text:
**Open Call — The New Symposium **

The New Symposium is launching new groups this weekend! It invites musicians, researchers, and artists working across music and related artistic disciplines 

—

Join one of **five ongoing groups** to take part in the** first in-person gathering at the 6th edition of Bled Contemporary Music Week in June**, where participants will exchange ideas and create together throughout the week in an open, collaborative format.

Participants form an interdisciplinary working group and develop their practice in dialogue with an international community. Weekly online exchanges, cross-disciplinary collaboration, and long-term peer learning create a dynamic space shaped by participants’ needs, enabling artistic growth and development.

**GROUPS and their orientation: **
* Friday I – Composition & Research based
* Friday II – Production & projects development
* Saturday I – Performance & Composition, emphasis on theoretical exploration 
* Saturday II – Interdisciplinary Group, Practice as the foundation for discussions
* Sunday I – Composition & Performance 

—

Participation fee: 100€ monthly 

Apply before May 25, to join the program and festival in June

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**film fabularny – EPIZODY AKTORSKIE DZIECIĘCE**

 

Do filmu fabularnego poszukuję **DZIEWCZYNKI 7-10 lat** oraz **CHŁOPCA 9-12 lat.**

 

Dzieci grają głównych bohaterów z czasów dzieciństwa. Jest to jedna scena, ale z dialogiem więc szukam dzieci z doświadczeniem przed kamerą.

 

**DZIEWCZYNKA 7-10 lat - **brunetka lub szatynka z jasnymi oczami — niebieskimi lub szaro-niebieskimi, ciemne oczy odpadają. Mile widziane piegi. **W scenie dziewczynka tańczy balet nad jeziorem** więc super byłoby, gdyby tańczyła lub potrafiła wykonać proste figury taneczne. 

 

**CHŁOPIEC 9-12 lat - **Blondyn lub ciemny blondyn z niebieskimi oczami. Typ łobuziaka. Ważne, aby potrafił jeździć na rowerze.

 

Casting będzie dwuetapowy:

1.     selekcja na podstawie nadesłanych materiałów,

2.     zaproszenie wybranych dzieci na casting do studia w Warszawie 2 lub 3 czerwca

Będę wdzięczna za przesłanie propozycji do **czwartku, 21.05, do godz. 10:00.**

Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć wizytówkę jako link do You Tube oraz krótki opis doświadczenia przed kamerą i informację odnośnie dziewczynki czy tańczy i jaki rodzaj tańca, i chłopca czy jeździ na rowerze.

Proszę nie podawać doświadczenia w reklamach ani statystowania.

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **OR**

W treści: **imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost**

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.text:
🎬 SZUKAMY STATYSTÓW (+16-99) DO TELEDYSKU — KRAKÓW, 25 MAJA

TY. Tak, dokładnie Ty.

Nie ma żadnych wymagań. Przyjdź, jak chcesz, w czym chcesz — w garniturze, dresie, kostiumie, cokolwiek. Twoja jedyna rola? Stać w kolejce. Serio, to wszystko.

Każdy jest tu idealny. Szukamy ludzi, nie typów — Polacy, obcokrajowcy, wszyscy mile widziani.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📍 Kraków

📅 25 maja (poniedziałek)

⏱ 1–3 godziny Twojego czasu

💵 40 zł gotówką na miejscu

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Chętny/a? Więcej szczegółów w wiadomości prywatnej.

Udostępnij dalej 🔁 — może ktoś z Twoich znajomych właśnie tego szuka.

⏱ 1–3 godziny Twojego czasu

💵 40 zł gotówką na miejscu

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Chętny/a? Więcej szczegółów w wiadomości prywatnej.

Udostępnij dalej 🔁 — może ktoś z Twoich znajomych właśnie tego szuka.

sharedPost.text:
Good Day, Bad Day.

One of the most quietly confronting exercises in Meisner training.

The emotional event has already happened somewhere outside. The actor comes home carrying the consequences of it. A promotion. A heartbreak. A betrayal. A triumph. Fury. Grief. Joy.

They enter the space alone.

And then… there is nothing to do.

That’s what makes the exercise so challenging. It’s not about action. It’s not about performing emotion. It’s about being.

And for many actors, simply being truthfull in front of other people can feel far more vulnerable than doing something dramatic.

The exercise gently pushes the actor towards greater vulnerability, honesty and presence. To breathe. To stop forcing. To allow the truth of the given circumstances to radiate naturally through the body and out into the audience -  even in complete stillness.

And audiences care deeply about that.

An actor sitting quietly in truthful vulnerability can be more powerful than pages of dialogue or explosive emotion.

Over time, the exercise builds resilience, compassion and an extraordinary sense of connection within the studio. Actors begin to realise how deeply audiences respond to simple human honesty.

No tricks.
No performance.
Just truth in being.

It’s a beautiful exercise.

Train with us and find out.
www.bodymindvoice.co.uk

#meisnertraining #actortraining #meisnerlondon #bodymindvoice

items.text:
Allen Athletinnen und Athleten der neuen Staffel von Ninja Warrior Germany wünsche ich von Herzen alles Gute, maximale Konzentration, starke Nerven und genau den Mut, den es braucht, wenn aus Training plötzlich dieser eine entscheidende Moment vor Kamera, Publikum und Parcours wird.

Was mich an diesem Format seit Jahren fasziniert, ist die Mischung aus Sprungkraft, Griffkraft, Explosivität, Technik, Ausdauer, Willen und mentaler Stärke. Genau diese Verbindung aus Vorbereitung, Timing, Präzision und Leidenschaft kenne ich aus meiner eigenen Arbeit als Filmproduzent, Kameramann, Regisseur, Cutter, Content Creator, Darsteller und Gründer der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion Köln.

Bei Ninja Warrior Germany zählt nicht nur, wer stark ist. Es zählt, wer im richtigen Augenblick fokussiert bleibt, wer unter Druck klar denkt, wer trotz Risiko sauber entscheidet und wer nach einem Fehler wieder aufsteht. Genau diese Haltung verbindet Sport, Show, Film, Bühne, Social Media und echte Produktionserfahrung.

Ich wünsche allen Teilnehmerinnen und Teilnehmern eine starke Staffel, faire Runs, unvergessliche Bilder und den Mut, sich selbst genau dann zu übertreffen, wenn alle hinschauen.

Und allen Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauern wünsche ich viel Freude, Spannung, Gänsehaut und diesen besonderen Moment, wenn man vor dem Bildschirm mitfiebert, obwohl man selbst gar nicht am Parcours hängt.

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner 

#NinjaWarriorGermany #RTL #RTLStudios #Karrideo #ChristianWeiße

items.text:
Manchmal laufen zwei Menschen erst aneinander vorbei, bis sie merken, dass genau dort die stärkste Szene entsteht, wo sie sich wiederfinden.

Genau dafür stehen Christian Weiße und ich, Sandra Wötzel.

Wir sind nicht nur privat ein eingespieltes Team, sondern bringen auch vor der Kamera, im Content, am Set und in der Produktion eine gemeinsame Energie mit, die für Caster, Booker, Content Producer, Filmproduktionen, TV-Stationen und Sender sehr wertvoll sein kann.

Wenn Ihr uns gemeinsam bucht, bekommt Ihr nicht einfach zwei Personen. Ihr bekommt ein echtes Duo mit natürlicher Verbindung, Kameraerfahrung, Produktionsverständnis und der Fähigkeit, Situationen glaubwürdig, ruhig und nahbar wirken zu lassen.

Die Top 5 Effekte für Eure Produktion:

1. Echte Chemie statt gespielter Nähe
Unsere Verbindung ist nicht konstruiert. Sie ist da. Das spart Inszenierungsaufwand und schafft glaubwürdige Bilder.

2. Zwei Perspektiven, ein gemeinsamer Rhythmus
Christian bringt als erfahrener Filmproduzent, Content Creator und Kameramann den Blick für Bild, Timing und Wirkung mit. Ich bringe Präsenz, Natürlichkeit, Social Media Gefühl und emotionale Lesbarkeit vor der Kamera ein.

3. Weniger Reibung am Set
Wir kennen Abläufe, arbeiten zuverlässig, pünktlich, teamfähig und können uns schnell auf Tonalität, Regieanweisungen und Produktionslogik einstellen.

4. Mehr Einsatzmöglichkeiten
Ob Social Ad, UGC, TV, Fiction, Werbung, Paarrolle, Alltagsszene, Interview, Moderation, Reaction, Familienmoment oder Content-Serie, wir können einzeln oder gemeinsam gedacht werden.

5. Mehr Story in einem Booking
Unser Zusammenspiel liefert sofort erzählerische Tiefe. Begegnung, Nähe, Distanz, Wiederfinden, Vertrauen, Humor, Alltag und Emotion entstehen bei uns nicht künstlich, sondern aus echter Erfahrung.

Dieses Video ist für mich deshalb mehr als ein schöner Moment. Es ist ein Sinnbild für alle, die uns vielleicht bisher nur einzeln gesehen haben und jetzt erkennen dürfen, was möglich wird, wenn man Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel gemeinsam trifft, bucht und kreativ einsetzt.

Einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Menschen gewinnen. 

Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.summary:
Manchmal laufen zwei Menschen erst aneinander vorbei, bis sie merken, dass genau dort die stärkste Szene entsteht, wo sie sich wiederfinden.

Genau dafür stehen Christian Weiße und ich, Sandra Wötzel.

Wir sind nicht nur privat ein eingespieltes Team, sondern bringen auch vor der Kamera, im Content, am Set und in der Produktion eine gemeinsame Energie mit, die für Caster, Booker, Content Producer, Filmproduktionen, TV-Stationen und Sender sehr wertvoll sein kann.

Wenn Ihr uns gemeinsam bucht, bekommt Ihr nicht einfach zwei Personen. Ihr bekommt ein echtes Duo mit natürlicher Verbindung, Kameraerfahrung, Produktionsverständnis und der Fähigkeit, Situationen glaubwürdig, ruhig und nahbar wirken zu lassen.

Die Top 5 Effekte für Eure Produktion:

1. Echte Chemie statt gespielter Nähe
Unsere Verbindung ist nicht konstruiert. Sie ist da. Das spart Inszenierungsaufwand und schafft glaubwürdige Bilder.

2. Zwei Perspektiven, ein gemeinsamer Rhythmus
Christian bringt als erfahrener Filmproduzent, Content Creator und Kameramann den Blick für Bild, Timing und Wirkung mit. Ich bringe Präsenz, Natürlichkeit, Social Media Gefühl und emotionale Lesbarkeit vor der Kamera ein.

3. Weniger Reibung am Set
Wir kennen Abläufe, arbeiten zuverlässig, pünktlich, teamfähig und können uns schnell auf Tonalität, Regieanweisungen und Produktionslogik einstellen.

4. Mehr Einsatzmöglichkeiten
Ob Social Ad, UGC, TV, Fiction, Werbung, Paarrolle, Alltagsszene, Interview, Moderation, Reaction, Familienmoment oder Content-Serie, wir können einzeln oder gemeinsam gedacht werden.

5. Mehr Story in einem Booking
Unser Zusammenspiel liefert sofort erzählerische Tiefe. Begegnung, Nähe, Distanz, Wiederfinden, Vertrauen, Humor, Alltag und Emotion entstehen bei uns nicht künstlich, sondern aus echter Erfahrung.

Dieses Video ist für mich deshalb mehr als ein schöner Moment. Es ist ein Sinnbild für alle, die uns vielleicht bisher nur einzeln gesehen haben und jetzt erkennen dürfen, was möglich wird, wenn man Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel gemeinsam trifft, bucht und kreativ einsetzt.

Einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Menschen gewinnen. 

Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße

items.text:
🎬 CASTING! CASTING! FINAL CALL! 🚨

Seeking married couples, long-term relationships, and couples with children NATIONWIDE for a nationally syndicated TV show 👀✨

❤️ Real couples

💍 Married OR not married

👨‍👩‍👧 Couples with kids are a PLUS

🔥 Real issues, real stories

‼️ REAL COUPLES ONLY — this is NOT a scripted role

🚫 No actors or individuals with acting credits, please

📲 APPLY HERE (copy & paste into your browser):

https://seekingmarriedlongtermcouplesinrelationshipsnationwidecasting.castingcrane.com/

✈️ WHAT WE PROVIDE:

• Round-trip airfare

• Hotel stay

• Pickup from your home (or preferred location) to your local airport

• A FREE day when you arrive in Atlanta

• Film the next day + fly home the same day

💰 PAY:

• $600 per person ($1,200 per couple)

• $100 each upon arrival

• $500 check each when you leave

💄 ON-SET PERKS:

• Hair, makeup & wardrobe provided

• Barber available for men

• (We recommend bringing your own wardrobe just in case)

✨ EXTRAS (if needed):

• Lie detector tests

• DNA tests

• Marriage & couples counseling (covered by us)

💬 If counseling is offered, we cover it. Typically it’s 1–2 sessions, depending on the situation, and your producer will go over all details with you.

📍 Filming in Atlanta (1-day shoot)

⏰ SPOTS ARE LIMITED — BOOKING FAST!

This is the FINAL CALL, don’t miss your chance!

#Miami #Orlando #Tampa #Jacksonville

#Birmingham #Montgomery #Huntsville

#Atlanta #Savannah #Augusta

#Nashville #Memphis #Knoxville #Chattanooga

#CharlestonSC #ColumbiaSC #GreenvilleSC

#Charlotte #Raleigh #Durham #Greensboro

#JacksonMS #Gulfport

#Louisville #LexingtonKY

#NewOrleans #BatonRouge

#RichmondVA #VirginiaBeach #NorfolkVA

#LittleRock #FayettevilleAR

#HartfordCT #NewHaven #BridgeportCT #StamfordCT

items.text:
Why Working with Local Filmmakers Is Vital for Emerging Actors
If you’re developing as an actor, it’s easy to focus on stage work, monologues, and agency showcases. But some of the fastest growth happens off the stage and in rooms you’ve never heard of, usually with a local filmmaker holding a camera and a coffee.

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/emma-turner-259525a6_acting-filmmaking-emergingactors-ugcPost-7462782694259605506-501M?utm_source=social_share_send&utm_medium=ios_app&rcm=ACoAABaAoSUBBvm3Us-PYfW-gV6d89gl5GDChy4&utm_campaign=copy_link

🚨 CALLING ALL BUSINESSES • BRANDS • ENTREPRENEURS 🚨

W.T. Jones Studios is now accepting PRODUCT PLACEMENT & BRAND PARTNERSHIP opportunities for our upcoming animated streaming-style series 🎬🔥

Want your business featured inside a cinematic animated series?

Now’s your chance to showcase your:
👟 Sneakers
👗 Clothing Brands
💄 Beauty Products
🍽 Restaurants
🚘 Luxury Vehicles
🏢 Real Estate Companies
🎙 Podcasts
💼 Local Businesses
✨ And More

We’re giving brands the opportunity to place their products directly into scenes, storylines, social media promotions, and streaming-style content.

🎥 Your brand could appear:
✔ Inside episodes
✔ In viral clips & reels
✔ On character products
✔ In luxury lifestyle scenes
✔ Across our social media promotions

This is affordable entertainment marketing with premium visuals and authentic storytelling.

📩 Serious business inquiries only:
(mailto:wt_jones_studios@yahoo.com)

🌐 www.wtjonesstudios.com 

Atlanta businesses, Black-owned brands, creators, and entrepreneurs — let’s build together.

#WTJonesStudios #ProductPlacement #BrandPartnership #AtlantaBusiness #BlackOwnedBusiness

items.text:
THE ULTIMATE SUMMER SCHOOL…

📍 ArtsEd London
📅 10–17 August

A jam-packed week of industry masterclasses with:

Kerry Ellis, Ben Forster, Diante Lodge, Ben Harris, Hannah Dimtsu, Hannah Taylor, Jacosta Almgil and Ollie Crouch

Plus, opportunities to be scouted for professional work.

✨ Ages 8+
✨ Payment options available

Spaces are limited — don’t miss out.

https://performnow.co.uk/icons-summer-week

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'P WWW.PERFORMNOW.CO.UK ICONS WORKINGO OUT SUMMER WEEK £12.60 PERHOUR PER HOUR JOIN SOME OF MUSICAL THEATRE'S MOST RESPECTED AND CELEBRATED PERFORMERS FOR A WEEK OF WEST END WORKSHOPS DESIGNED tO Kerry Ellis DEVELOP SKILLS, BUILD CONFIDENCE, AND HAVE HEAPS OF FUN TOO. STANDARD BOOKING: €379 VIPBOOKING €450 €50 DEPOSIT ONL REQUIRED OF BOOKING! PAYMENT PLANS SEE BOOKING PAGE PAGE POINT Ben Forster BEN HARRIS, HANNAH DIMTSU, JACOS ΓΑ ALMGIL. HANNAH TAYLOR, DIANTÉ LODGE WITH MORE EXCITING NAMES STILL to BE ANNOUNCED. Mon 10th Fri14t 14th August 10:00 am 4:00 pm 穿 ArtsEd, Chiswick, London WWW.PERFORMNOW.CO.UK P INFO@PERFORMNOW.COUK'

items.text:
Seeking actor for the role of BOB in the short film All American Dinner.
BOB
White male, mid-50s to early 70s. 
A longtime husband who has grown distant and emotionally inattentive in his marriage. Set in his ways, distracted, and unaware of the emotional disconnect around him. Dry realism and subtle emotional depth are important for the role.

Filming: September
Location: Los Angeles
Compensation: Paid, credit, meals 

Non union 

To submit, please send:
• Headshot
• Resume/Reel (if available)
• Contact Information

Email: allamericandinner@gmail.com.    
Subject Line: “BOB Submission – All American Dinner

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM**

We are casting for an upcoming short film rooted in Oakland culture, family, identity, and community. Seeking actors who can bring authenticity, emotional depth, and strong presence to the following roles. Looking to film in the Bay Area in September. Experience preferred, but not required.

If Interested, please e-mail acting resume with portfolio to [gellipascualmedia@gmail.com](mailto:gellipascualmedia@gmail.com) with the Subject Line entitled “JORDAN SHORT - CASTING SUBMISSION – [Role Name] – [Actor Name]”

**JORDAN**

**Age Range:** 19–20
**Ethnicity:** African American / Biracial
**Height:** 5’7”–6’3
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan is stylish, confident, and naturally charismatic. He carries the pride, depth, and culture of Oakland in a way that feels effortless and real. His style is intentional and expressive — cool without trying too hard. Hair can be locs, braids, or a curly fro. Jordan has quiet strength, emotional depth, and is still growing into who he is. We are looking for someone grounded, layered, and authentic.

**JOVAN**

**Age Range:** 19–23
**Ethnicity:** Filipino American
**Height:** 5’7”–6’4”
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jovan is fashionable, charismatic, and full of personality. He has a bold, unapologetic look , possibly a low fade, rat tail, or a distinct personal style that stands out. On the surface, he is funny, playful, and magnetic, but underneath is someone intelligent, observant, and mysterious. He notices more than he says and keeps people guessing.

**MARIE **

**Age Range:** 40–50
**Ethnicity:** Filipino
**Language: **Must be fluent in Tagalog
**Background:** From the Philippines

Marie is a strong, smart, and resilient Filipino woman with lived experience. She carries authority naturally and has a presence that commands respect. She is tough but loving, direct but caring. Marie is grounded, practical, emotionally intelligent, and unafraid to speak the truth.  

**GRANDPA / JOVAN’S GRANDFATHER**

**Age Range:** 60–80
**Ethnicity:** Filipino
**Language: **Must be fluent in Tagalog
**Background:** From the Philippines

Grandpa is a quiet, observant Filipino elder whose presence says more than words. He may not speak often, but when he does, it matters. Looking for someone who can bring stillness, dignity, and emotional weight to the role.

**PROFESSOR AUGUSTINE**

**Age Range:** 30–40
**Ethnicity:** Caucasian
**Height:** 6’0”–6’3”
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Professor Augustine is intelligent, grounded, and intentional. He understands Oakland, its culture, and its community. He serves as a mentor figure,supportive, but not afraid to challenge his students to think deeper and grow. We are looking for someone who can bring warmth, intellect, and a strong mentor-like presence.

**MYLO**

**Age Range:** 13
**Ethnicity:** Latino
**Height:** Short for his age

Mylo is a sharp, observant young teen with big energy. He is curious, impressionable, and figuring out who he wants to become. He looks up to the older boys and absorbs everything happening around him. There is innocence in him, but also a toughness shaped by his environment. Mylo represents youth, potential, and the crossroads between childhood and the streets.

**JORDAN’S MOTHER**

**Age Range:** Late 40s–Mid 50s
**Ethnicity:** White
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan’s mother is strong, grounded, and emotionally aware. She understands Oakland and the complexities of the world her son is navigating. She is protective, loving, and firm. While she may not always fully understand Jordan’s choices or environment, her love for him is deep. She wants him to be accountable, focused, and safe.

**JORDAN’S FATHER**

**Age Range:** 40s–50s
**Ethnicity:** African American
**Occupation:** Truck Driver
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan’s father is hardworking, disciplined, and practical. As a truck driver, he has spent years on the road providing for his family. He may not be overly expressive, but his love shows through action, sacrifice, and responsibility. He believes in structure, accountability, and hard work. We are looking for someone who can bring strength, realism, and quiet emotional depth.

We are looking for someone who can bring strength, realism, and quiet emotional depth.
items.title: **CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM**

items.text:
Posting for a friend! Please do not DM me, I won't likely see it.

**Casting Call - San Jose** (Student Film)

Looking for an actor for a scene/skit this week. Flexible on day but looking for someone for 1.5-2hrs between 11am and 2pm near Japantown in San Jose. Open to any ethnicity, age (18+) and experience. 

This is for a school project so unpaid but will grab you a coffee and provide the edited copy in a month or less.

About the short film:
In a city park, a man’s seemingly harmless morning routine with his squirrel-chasing dog turns into a moral reckoning when a stranger calls his attention to the visible fear of the little mammals.

Casting for:
PARKGOER - an active member of the community who prides themselves on being respectful and ethical. A believer of "see something, say something", is never afraid to be the bold one to stick out in the crowd for what's right. Grew up with pets and is an animal lover.

This is best suited for someone who is looking to collaborate, add to their reel/experience or just want to get involved in a fun, little shoot! Copy & credit

If interested, please email  zakbyrd@campjupiter.com with your reel and headshots (if available). Thank you so much!

items.text:
🎭 HOW I WENT FROM UNKNOWN TO BOOKING A LEAD ROLE ON A NETFLIX SHOW AT 18
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley.

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two Netflix series and the LEAD in six feature films. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by CLINT EASTWOOD and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series ONCE UPON A TIME.

I started out when I was 14 and went from having no connections to signing with one of the biggest agents in Hollywood at 17, moving to LA, and booking a series regular on a Netflix show within three months.

Some people call that luck, but what they don’t see is the years of hard work and the clear strategy behind every move I made to move forward. 

Lately, I have been connecting with so many of you, and one thing keeps coming up again and again:

ACTORS WHO ARE FEELING STUCK AND DON’T KNOW WHAT TO DO TO CHANGE IT

You train.
You get your materials together.
You are told “get an agent.”

But then…
You get an agent and nothing happens
Or you do not have one yet and don’t know how to get in the room

And if nothing changes, how will your career look two year from now?

That frustration is exactly why I created this.

A 2 hour, 1 to 1 personalised career mentorship session over Zoom.

We cover:
• The one skill an actor must have to book work, and how to assess if you truly have it (hint: it’s not talent) 
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t have an agent, and how to actively work toward getting one
• What to do if your agent isn’t sending you auditions 
• What to do if you’re auditioning a lot but not booking (the key most actors miss)
• The materials you actually need, and what most actors get wrong
• How to expand opportunities for yourself
• Plus much more

YOU LEAVE WITH AN EXACT PLAN TO BRIDGE THE GAP BETWEEN WHERE YOU ARE NOW AND WHERE YOU WANT TO GET TO, PLUS THE EXACT STRATEGY I USED TO GO FROM UNKNOWN TO WORKING ACTOR.

If you’re ready to commit, comment COMMIT below or send me a DM 🤗

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of one or more people

topComments.text: The problems we have is we live in a small seaside town. And casting want people who live within and hour of filming. That’s never going to be an option for us. Even though we are willing to travel.

items.text:
Hi everyone! Hope it’s okay to share this here ☺️

This summer we’re hosting our annual TMA Collective  PROgramme, a 10 day summer intensive for young performers aged 8 to 18, offering professional training in performing arts ☀️

We created this because we kept seeing talented, passionate young people who just needed the right environment, guidance and opportunity to truly flourish.

Over 10 days, young performers get to:
⚡️ Take part in West End Masterclasses
📸 Receive Spotlight-ready Headshots
📖 Take part in Dance, Singing & Drama workshops
🎙 Record their own vocal reel
🎶 Star in a MT Music Video
🎥 Record their own acting reel
🔥 Perform in a showcase for family & friends
🖤 Receive mentoring from Tucker Management agents and team throughout 

Even if your child has no plans for a career in the arts, but loves to sing, act or perform, this is the perfect way for them to spend their summer. 10 days of doing what they love, whilst making great friendships and memories 🖤

Every young performer who attends is also considered for representation with our talent agency Tucker Management  🖤

Details:
📅 3rd - 14th August 2026
📍 Create Studios, Leicester
🪩 Ages 8–18
🖤🔗 Apply via this link: https://rb.gy/xiar18

sharedPost.text:
Sesja zdjęciowej dla klienta z branży eventowo - biznesowej! Poszukujemy dzieci:

🔹 Dziewczynki, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/7dade83ff01142b4ae0a848c8c136b88

🔹 Chłopcy, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/46ba1a3b82f24c3db879179f2203a199

📍 Termin zdjęć: 5 czerwca 
📍 Miejsce: Warszawa 
📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne

💰 Stawka: 300 zł za dzień zdjęciowy
(płatne gotówką po planie) 

📸 Wymagania:
Otwarte, śmiałe. Proszę o zdjęcia z uśmiechem, w ruchu, podczas zabawy. Link z wizytówką będzie dodatkowym atutem.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać tylko przez linki zamieszczone pod nazwą roli. W razie dodatkowych pytań kontakt na: sky.zgloszenie@gmail.com

❗ Zgłoszenia na maila nie będą rozpatrywane.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Sesja zdjęciowa Dzieci 7-10 lat 5 czerwca'

May be an image of text that says 'NOWY PROGRAM KULINARNY SZUKA UCZESTNIKÓW Lubisz gotować? Zgłoś się do nowego programu kulinarnego! Szukamy osób solo oraz duetów- rodzin, par, rodzeństwa, przyjaciół, babć wnukami wszystkich, którzy p prostu uwielbiają gotować. Nie trzeba być profesjonalnym kucharzem. Liczy się pasja do gotowania, osobowość pomysł na siebie. Wyślij swoje imię nazwisko wraz numerem telefonu na adres: zuzanna.kasterka@rochstar.tv កណធធធាវាាស្ស្ស Na uczestników czekają nagrody Czekamy na Was!'

sharedPost.text:
𝗡𝗲𝘄 𝗮𝘁 𝗕𝗼𝗱𝘆𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗱 𝗧𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗽𝘆 𝗕𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗶𝗻: Belly Massage for Women & FLINTA*
​
The belly is one of the most emotionally and physically charged areas of the body — connected to stress, digestion, menstruation, hormones, emotions, vulnerability, and nervous system regulation.
​
Yet it’s also an area many people disconnect from, tense, hide, or ignore.
​
This treatment focuses exactly there: through integrative bodywork, belly massage, and nervous system-focused touch.
​
A powerful journey back to your center.
​
📍 In Berlin-Kreuzberg
​
→ 𝗟𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲:
https://www.bodymindtherapy.de/en/integrative-bodywork-frauen-in-berlin
.
.
.
​
#bellymassage #abdominalmassage #womensbodywork #flintabodywork #massageberlin #bodyworkberlin #berlinkreuzberg #nervoussystemregulation

items.text:
📸 Suche Fotografen & Videografen! Offen für alle Arten von Shootings 🎥
Hi! Ich bin auf der Suche nach Kooperationen und offen für absolut jedes Format: Foto, Video, kreative Projekte oder kommerzielle Werbedrehs.

Kurz vorab: Ich bin kein Runway-Model mit Modelmaßen. Ich bin eine ganz normale Frau mit einem natürlichen Look, aber super motiviert, mich in verschiedensten Stilen auszuprobieren и neue Looks umzusetzen.

Ich bin zeitlich extrem flexibel, fast immer verfügbar und spontan einsatzbereit. Wenn ihr ein Gesicht für euer Projekt sucht oder kurzfristig jemanden vor der Kamera braucht — schreibt mir einfach, ich bin für jeden Spaß zu haben!

📍 Location: Berlin (und Umgebung).

📩 Schreibt mir gerne eine private Nachricht, ich freue mich auf eure Ideen!

items.text:
In case you missed Season 6…check it out!  Make sure to follow Kick Ass Film Fest to stay up to date with our next Season. 

www.kickassfilmfest.com

sharedPost.text:
The official recap video is officially live! We want to extend a huge thank you to everyone who made this chapter of the Kick Ass Film Fest our best one yet. To our filmmakers, supporters, sponsors, family, and friends: thank you for your endless passion and dedication. We love seeing the immense growth of the Colorado film community and are incredibly excited for what the future holds.

A special thank you goes to Tyler Shown and David Armenta for their fantastic work behind the camera, filming the magic of the night and capturing our interviews. We also want to give a shout-out to the phenomenal team at Pueblo Memorial Hall for being so awesome and helping us keep the evening flowing flawlessly, as well as our kick-ass MC, Nova Meets, for keeping the crowd hyped from start to finish.

Check out the full recap video below! Plus, the excitement doesn't stop here—those red carpet interviews captured by Tyler and David will be rolling out throughout the summer, so be sure to follow us across all platforms to catch them as they drop.

www.kickassfilmfest.com

items.text: Looking for an actor who can play a teaching role for a student short film.

topComments.text: Kristan Leclerc Emily Snow Sledge Antonio Calvo Wade Pessin would all play teachers really well
Consider using a SAG student contract so you can open this up to SAG actors in your area. It allows them to work legally for free!

items.text:
NEW CASTING: 

We are casting for a still shoot taking place on June 6th in south Denver. Pay is $500/person and you would be needed for approximately 3 hours. This is for a housing division and usage is in perpetuity. If you have an agent, please be sure they are ok with this before you submit. 

Adult Couple: A man and woman in their early 30s, all ethnicities. 

Family: A dad (30-40), mom (30–40), son (around 10), and daughter (around 8), all ethnicities. 

Active Adult Couple: A man and woman in their early 60s, grey haired preferred. 

If you're a fit, please send 2-3 pictures (one full body and one that clearly shows your face, no hat or sunglasses) to kari.white@comcast.net. 

Photo Credit: Kevin Steele

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of range hood and kitchen island

items.text:
🎭 КАСТИНГ: иммерсивный проект
📍 Кипр (Лимасол)

Мы ищем артистов для участия в иммерсивном интерактивном перформансе — работа в пространстве с живым взаимодействием со зрителями, без классической сцены.

💥 Артисты оригинального жанра
(акробатика, пластика, клоунада, физический театр)

Формат:
иммерсивный интерактивный перформанс, работа в образе, импровизация, взаимодействие со зрителями.

🔥 Импровизационное шоу
РОЛИ: «Пожарные» / «Богатыри»

Ищем артистов с:
— хорошей физической формой
— атлетичным телосложением
— уверенной сценической подачей
— умением работать с публикой
— готовностью к импровизации и взаимодействию

Формат:
иммерсивный перформанс с живым взаимодействием со зрителями.

🌀 Отдельно: артисты на пого-стилтах (pogo stilts)

Ищем исполнителей, работающих на пружинных прыгающих ходулях для участия в динамичных иммерсивных сценах.

Требования:
— опыт работы на пого-стилтах
— хорошая физическая подготовка
— координация и сценическая выразительность
— умение работать в образе и взаимодействовать с публикой

📅 Даты:
24–27 июня 
— 24–26 — репетиции
— 27 — работа / показ

💼 Условия:
— гонорар
— перелёт туда-обратно оплачивается компанией
— питание оплачивается компанией

📲 WhatsApp: +34695489512

❗️Для отклика отправляйте в WhatsApp:
— фото / видео
— промо-материалы
— описание номера или навыков
— имя, возраст и город проживания

items.text:
CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM

For an independent short film shooting near Stuttgart, we are looking for an elderly woman (75–90 years old) for a supporting role:

LUDMILLA IVANOVNA / LJUDA
• Woman · 75–90 years old
• Russian required
• German / English not important
• Face that tells a story

Character:
An elderly woman living in Germany the same way she used to live in the USSR. Strict but fair, and eager to help others by passing on traditions.

Logline:
A sleep-deprived daughter of Russian immigrants, struggling with lifelong sleep paralysis, discovers a new technique to escape her episodes.

Details:
• Preferably based near Stuttgart
• Unpaid / no-budget production
• Transportation & meals covered
• 1 shooting day around June 14th (exact date TBD)

Apply here:

[dreamwalking.film@gmail.com](mailto:dreamwalking.film@gmail.com)

———  

CASTING CALL — KURZFILM 

Für einen unabhängigen Kurzfilm im Raum Stuttgart suchen wir eine ältere Frau (75–90 Jahre) für eine Nebenrolle:

LUDMILLA IVANOVNA / LJUDA
• Frau · 75–90 Jahre alt
• Russisch erforderlich
• Deutsch / Englisch nicht wichtig
• Gesicht, das eine Geschichte erzählt

Charakter:
Ältere Frau, die in Deutschland noch immer so lebt wie früher in der UdSSR. Streng, aber fair und bemüht, Menschen durch die Weitergabe ihrer Traditionen zu helfen.

Logline:
Eine schlaflose Tochter russischer Immigrant:innen, die ihr ganzes Leben unter Schlafparalysen leidet, entdeckt eine neue Methode, sich daraus zu befreien.

Infos:
• Idealerweise aus dem Raum Stuttgart
• Unbezahlt / No-Budget-Produktion
• Anreise & Verpflegung werden übernommen
• 1 Drehtag um den 14. Juni (genaues Datum folgt)

Bewerbung an:
[dreamwalking.film@gmail.com](mailto:dreamwalking.film@gmail.com)

Für einen Werbedreh werden 6 Statisten gesucht, gedreht wird am 26.05. in Stuttgart. Es wird ein Live-Event sein mit Bezug zur Weltmeisterschaft 2026. 

Gesucht werden Männer im alter von 20-40 Jahren, die einen Lieferfahrer spielen.
Gedreht wird von 11 - 22 Uhr. 

Bei interesse bitte auch direkt ein Foto mit schicken. 

Das ganze wird natürlich bezahlt! 

Liebe Grüße und bis bald

items.text:
Kære Alle. 

Vi søger akut statister til en reklamefilm, der filmes senere i dag. Vi filmer under Bispebuen i København fra klokken 19.30 - 21.00 

Vi søger både drenge og piger i alderen 15-17 år. Forældre/værge behøver ikke at deltage i optagelserne, men det er vigtigt at de skriver under på statistkontrakten. 

Hvis du eller dit barn er interesserede, så send gerne en SMS med et billede til vores koordinator Gül på følgende nummer: 42 53 23 22. 
Hun vil også kunne fortælle mere om optagelserne.

Jobbet er lønnet!

🎬 CASTING CALL – OTHER MANS LIFE🎬

Seeking actors for our upcoming dramatic short film: THE OTHER MAN’S LIFE

A grounded psychological drama about two men from opposite worlds who trade lives for 24 hours, only to realize the life they wanted comes with consequences they never saw coming.

(UNPAID STUDENT SHORT‼️ trying to get the name out) 

Location: Raleigh/Durham area
 
Shoot date: June 11-13

EMAIL: eandmcinematic@gmail.com

ROLES:

• JACK (Lead) – Male, 35–45
Successful, wealthy, emotionally hollow. Corporate, sharp, controlled, carrying deep loneliness.

items.text:
Casting male actor in the 40-50s age range- should be attractive, brown hair.
This is a lead role in the film with roughly 4-5 short scenes with very minimal dialogue. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA. Actors MUST be local to LA or the San Fernando Valley!

If you are interested or know someone who might fit the role please DM me! Thank you!

topComments.text: " should be attractive, brown hair".. Just say you freaking wanna hire a WHITE MAN !!!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – PAID ROLES – ONLINE AUDITIONS MONDAY
There Are Wolves Here Too is casting for the roles of Dylan Mayer and Robin.

This is a vertical drama / horror coming-of-age series set in Britpop Brighton, summer ’97.

We are looking for Sussex/London-based actors who are 18+, but can convincingly play 16–17.

Roles:

ROBIN — 16, Year 11

Bright, observant and slightly off-centre socially. Robin thinks in patterns and likes rules because rules make the world feel understandable. He performs confidence with jokes and dares, but underneath there is vulnerability and truth.

DYLAN MAYER — 16, Year 11

Charming, socially confident and funny. Dylan is the kid who makes things feel normal and knows how to keep the mood light, but his charm is also functional — it keeps doors open and keeps people from asking the wrong questions.

Auditions: Online auditions on Monday

Shoot dates: Must be available 6–8 August 2026

Location: Sussex/Brighton area

Pay: Paid role

Age: 18+ only, must be able to play 16–17

To apply, please email your headshot &  showreel to:

tawht@vivlovesfilm.com

Please only apply if you are available for the shoot dates.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of map and text

topComments.text: Hi, are you open to actors from outside of the london area applying? x

items.title: CASTING CALL – PAID ROLES – ONLINE AUDITIONS MONDAY

items.text:
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of Realism, Action & Humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community including Racism. Based on True Events of a well known case originally set in the era of the 80's. The story will then dive into the current modern life of the culture from the new generations of South Asian Brits of Diaspora's. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld.
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of Realism, Action & Humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community including Racism. Based on True Events of a well known case originally set in the era of the 80's. The story will then dive into the current modern life of the culture from the new generations of South Asian Brits of Diaspora's. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld. 

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT

The story centres young people from South Asian backgrounds living in the UK, and international students navigating life in Britain/Europe. 

This is a multi-layered narrative covering: 

- Identity & belonging

- Family dynamics & generational conflict

- Love, relationships & marriage

- Crime & survival in urban environments

- Cultural expectations & taboo subjects

- Personal ambition and redefining success 

Each character will have a deep backstory, with storylines unfolding across drama, suspense, humour, and realism.

The project has already been seen successfully as a Theatre Stage Play production tester and is currently being developed for an on-screen series, with potential partnerships across major streaming platforms such as Netflix UK, BBC Films, BFI Film Council, Channel 4, ITV X Studios, Film Four, HBO Max, Hulu, Mubi, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Facebook Watch, Sky Studios, Plex, Paramount Pictures Plus, Pluto TV, Now TV, Channel Five, Peacock, Eros Now and B4U Motion Pictures Studios. 

🎬 WHO WE ARE CASTING 

We are seeking British South Asian (Desi) Talents: 

Must be UK born or raised within the UK with Strong understanding of British South Asian culture, including Social issues & taboo topics, music, arts, entertainment and Community dynamics with lived experiences. Preferably London based. We already have tons of applicants who have applied from other parts of the UK. We are now focused on 'London' applications.

Age Range: Open to all age groups

Experienced and None-Experienced 

All Genders Can Apply

📍 LOCATION 

Auditions, rehearsals, and filming will take place in London. Rehearsals held at a North London studio base. Some filming may occur in other UK locations depending on production needs. 

🎥 PRODUCTION DETAILS 

Project currently in development, writing, and script editing stage. Selected applicants will take part in:

Rehearsals, Character development, Minor Stunt coordination (If Required) 

Refreshments and facilities will be provided during rehearsals and production. 

💼 COMPENSATION 

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements

upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued

with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.

❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:

Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing

Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. We Highly advice to follow these simple rules because we are busy organising the project. 

E-Mail Applications to: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

items.summary:
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of Realism, Action & Humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community including Racism. Based on True Events of a well known case originally set in the era of the 80's. The story will then dive into the current modern life of the culture from the new generations of South Asian Brits of Diaspora's. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld.
A bold new upcoming British South Asian Series Show is currently in development for major Streaming Platforms entering it's casting phase. This project is a raw, hard-hitting drama thriller with elements of Realism, Action & Humour, exploring narratives based from real life society within the Desi British community including Racism. Based on True Events of a well known case originally set in the era of the 80's. The story will then dive into the current modern life of the culture from the new generations of South Asian Brits of Diaspora's. Drawing inspiration from titles such as Man Like Mobeen, Mogul Mowgli, Ill Manors, Bend It Like Beckham, Blinded By The Lights, Daytimers, Everywhere & Nowhere, Virdee & Apnas. The series aims to authentically portray the urban underworld of British South Asian pop culture. This story is about the Struggles & the rise of British South Asian Empires. Celebrating the rich culture, portraying the community in it's truest form of untolled legacy's of the sub-culture. The Fast Cars, the Music & Arts, the Fashion, the Wealth & Politics. Each Characters portraying it's story, following their journey from a Motion Picture portrayal of the British South Asian Underworld. 

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT

The story centres young people from South Asian backgrounds living in the UK, and international students navigating life in Britain/Europe. 

This is a multi-layered narrative covering: 

- Identity & belonging

- Family dynamics & generational conflict

- Love, relationships & marriage

- Crime & survival in urban environments

- Cultural expectations & taboo subjects

- Personal ambition and redefining success 

Each character will have a deep backstory, with storylines unfolding across drama, suspense, humour, and realism.

The project has already been seen successfully as a Theatre Stage Play production tester and is currently being developed for an on-screen series, with potential partnerships across major streaming platforms such as Netflix UK, BBC Films, BFI Film Council, Channel 4, ITV X Studios, Film Four, HBO Max, Hulu, Mubi, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Facebook Watch, Sky Studios, Plex, Paramount Pictures Plus, Pluto TV, Now TV, Channel Five, Peacock, Eros Now and B4U Motion Pictures Studios. 

🎬 WHO WE ARE CASTING 

We are seeking British South Asian (Desi) Talents: 

Must be UK born or raised within the UK with Strong understanding of British South Asian culture, including Social issues & taboo topics, music, arts, entertainment and Community dynamics with lived experiences. Preferably London based. We already have tons of applicants who have applied from other parts of the UK. We are now focused on 'London' applications.

Age Range: Open to all age groups

Experienced and None-Experienced 

All Genders Can Apply

📍 LOCATION 

Auditions, rehearsals, and filming will take place in London. Rehearsals held at a North London studio base. Some filming may occur in other UK locations depending on production needs. 

🎥 PRODUCTION DETAILS 

Project currently in development, writing, and script editing stage. Selected applicants will take part in:

Rehearsals, Character development, Minor Stunt coordination (If Required) 

Refreshments and facilities will be provided during rehearsals and production. 

💼 COMPENSATION 

This production forms part of a strategic development plan toward a full television adaptation. Compensation terms are structured as follows: 

Engagement at this stage is based on development participation agreements

upon successful transition into full production, formal contracts will be issued

with fees which align with industry standard rates (FAA/Union-Equivalent structures where applicable). Final compensation, including percentage participation and fees, will be determined by the financing team once full production budgets are in place. All financial terms will be clearly outlined and contractually agreed prior to principal. 

⚠️ IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING 

We are casting for Serious, Committed, and Professional applicants Only. 

❌ NO time-wasters. Applications will be removed if this information is ignored.

❗ Read all information carefully before applying. If you dismiss this instruction, your application will be automatically Deleted. 

✅ Only apply if you are:

Fully Committed and Flexible with availability. Ready to engage. Applicants who demonstrate professionalism and attention to detail will be prioritised for casting interviews. 

🚀 WHAT WE OFFER 

Opportunity to be part of a groundbreaking British South Asian series with Character development and performance training. Support in personal Branding/Growth and marketing

Collaboration. Whether you are represented by an agent or independent, you are welcome to apply provided you are contractually available. 

📩 NEXT STEP 

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Casting Interview Screening where full character breakdowns and project direction will be discussed in detail. Confirmed applicants will be called in for a Test Shoot later on in the season. 

Ideally we are Casting London based talents. Although if you are not from London and want to get involved, you are welcome to if you are open to travelling. Although this will be Your responsibility if you are able to reach call times as scheduled. 

To Apply, simply Facebook Inbox or E-Mail your Portfolio, Credentials if you own any with your Contact Info. Do Not apply if you cannot provide any form of contact details. Mention your Availability of the best Time/Date when to reach out to you. We Highly advice to follow these simple rules because we are busy organising the project. 

E-Mail Applications to: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

items.text:
🌷CASTING CALL🍄
Hi Lovelies!

For my thesis film 'I Herde a Fly Buzz' I am looking for 2 Actresses and 1 Actor. It is a Queer Folk Horrot set in the 1300s to shoot Mid June. Collaborative by food and transport provided! As well as any headshots or showreel footage. London Based.

Felis- Mid 20s, wild-hearted, yearns for independence. 

Ingerid- Mid 20s, witch-type, living on the land in a rejection of society. 

David- Late 20s/30s, devout Catholic, gruff, ideally with a beard.

Brief: Unfulfilled in her suffocating marriage Felis clings to her affair with the woman in the woods Ingerid for help, which leads her devout husband into a final confrontation.

If interested please reach out to me via Facebook or Email at sterlingknightfilm@gmail.com🍄🐚🌷

items.text:
Hello, my name is Quigley Roberts, and I am an actor from Las Cruces, New Mexico. Thank you.
Resume and contact information 
https://dot.cards/quigleyroberts

sharedPost.text:
Quigley Roberts Bio
I was born in 1990 in Las Cruces, New Mexico, to parents in their late 40s who never expected to have a child. From the very beginning, my life has been full of the unexpected. My childhood was marked by both joy and hardship—most vividly, losing my grandmother on my seventh birthday. That early encounter with grief shaped my understanding of life in a way that has stayed with me ever since: tragedies will always be there, but they do not define who we are. What defines us is our will to keep moving forward, to keep trying, and to refuse to give up on ourselves.
Growing up, I worked with my hands. I started out as a tradesman, doing HVAC jobs, mechanical work, and even working in security. I spent years chasing stability in whatever jobs I could find. But no matter how hard I worked, I felt like I was drifting—moving from job to job without a sense of direction or purpose. I thought back to when I was a kid and remembered the one dream that had always been in my heart: acting.
At 35, I made the decision to finally pursue that dream. I knew it wouldn’t be easy, especially starting later in life, but I also knew that determination would be the key to everything. I’ve lived through enough to know that failure only exists when you quit, and I was not about to quit on myself.
My life has not been without hardship. I’ve survived multiple motorcycle accidents, gone through divorce, and lost both friends and family. In one accident, I was resuscitated twice on the way to the hospital. I had an out-of-body experience in which my subconscious asked me if I was done. My answer was clear: I wasn’t. That moment became a turning point. I realized that my life wasn’t meant to be lived halfway and that I had been given another chance to pursue my true calling.
Acting has given me more joy, energy, and excitement than any other chapter of my life. Stepping into this world has been both terrifying and thrilling, pushing me out of my comfort zone and showing me that my potential runs far deeper than I ever believed. Every audition, every rehearsal, every opportunity is a reminder that I am alive, and I am meant to give everything I have to this path.

items.text:
CVS Health Services Customers Testimonial Casting
[[https://cvs.castingcrane.com/](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)
* Has CVS had a significant, positive impact on your health / life?
* Do you regularly visit CVS Pharmacy, MinuteClinic, Specialty Pharmacy, or CVS Retail?
* Have you benefited from any CVS health services such as pharmacy deliveries, Minute Clinic mental health services, women's health services, etc?
* Do you have a story of how CVS has helped you along your health journey?

If you answered "yes" to any of these questions, then we want to hear from you! *(All selected talent will be compensated.)*

CVS and Edelman are looking for real people across the country to share their stories on how the different CVS health services have played an important, emotional, or memorable role in their health journey. These empowering testimonial videos will share stories of how CVS, CVS Pharmacy, Signify Health, MinuteClinic, CVS Specialty Pharmacy, etc. have helped everyone from college students to caregivers to cancer survivors to people who just love CVS. Whether you shop at CVS regularly, have visited the MinuteClinic, relied on the Specialty Pharmacy, or benefited from preventive screenings offered at a CVS location - we want to hear from you. 

*Selected candidates will take part in a filmed interview in late May / early June, where they will discuss how CVS is a part of their life.*

**If you are interested in being considered for this project, please fill out our casting application at **[[https://cvs.castingcrane.com/](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)** or email us directly at casting@pairedupmedia.com**

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'REAL PEOPLE CASTING c CVS HEALTH CUSTOMERS WELLNESS WE S SS S Has CVS had positive impact on your health & wellness journey? Do you regularly visit CVS Pharmacy, MinuteClinic, Specialty Pharmacy, or CVS Retail? Have you benefited from any of the many health services offered through CVS? If you answered "YES" to any of these questions, we want to hear from you! CASTING@PAIREDUPMEDIA.COM PAIRED + UP MEDIA'

items.text:
AUDITION NOTICE !! - TRUE WEST
Playbox Productions is excited to announce:

**TRUE WEST**
**by Sam Shepard**

Directed by **Samuel G.C. Muñoz**

**IN-PERSON AUDITIONS:**
Sunday, June 14, 2026
Starting at 9:00AM

**LOCATION:**
2820 Smallman Street
Pittsburgh, PA 15222

**AUDITION REQUIREMENTS:**
• Prepare TWO contrasting 1-minute monologues (Dark comedy preferred)
• Bring headshot & resume

**CALLBACKS:**
Wednesday, June 17 at 10:00AM
(Same location)
*Please make sure you are available for callbacks if auditioning.

**NOTE:** To be considered, you MUST:
• Fill out the Google Form (Link in Bio)
• Book an audition slot through the True West Auditions page link
If you do not reserve a time-slot, you will NOT have an audition appointment.

**PERFORMANCE DATES:**
September 24 – October 4, 2026
(10 Performances Over Two Weekends)

**Three Stories Theater**
937 Liberty Ave
Pittsburgh, PA

**COMPENSATION:**
All roles are paid. Stipends provided. (based on overall production performance) 

**Questions or scheduling conflicts?**
Email: playboxpgh@gmail.com
https://playboxproductions.com

**NOTE:** We are still looking for a few Stage Management production members to join the team, if that is any interest to you please email us ASAP: **playboxpgh@gmail.com**

**Tickets @** https://playbox.ticketspice.com/true-west

Presented by PLAYBOX Productions in partnership with the Pittsburgh Cultural Trust.
